title: Undertale totem
description: An resorce pack that turns the totem to undertale save point
body:
this resorce pack is a udnertale themed totem texture pack that turns yours totem into a save point


This texture pack turns your totem of undying into undertale save point.![example picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffe47dee078705ae36142ed09e89bd32bfc2c595.png)
